home.title: Home
home.description: Welcome to Les Griots Studio, where creativity meets innovation. Explore our portfolio of projects and discover how we bring ideas to life.

work.title: Work
work.description: Discover our diverse range of projects that showcase our expertise in design, development, and storytelling. Each project is a testament to our commitment to excellence and creativity.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Learn more about Les Griots Studio, our mission, values, and the talented team behind our innovative projects. We are passionate about creating impactful experiences through design and technology.

ecosystem.title: Ecosystem
ecosystem.description: Explore the vibrant ecosystem of Les Griots Studio, where we collaborate with partners, clients, and communities to create meaningful connections and drive innovation in the creative industry.
